key_threats: 7 wins from 9 — fourth strongest team in Group B, very consistent
NRR +1.76 shows they win comfortably — quality in both departments
1 NR result suggests a wide squad that adapts to conditions
key_weaknesses: 1 loss shows they are beatable with a disciplined performance
NRR lower than Giant Slayers and Pway Cubs — possibly faced stronger opposition for that loss
WW playing this late-season (Aug 30) — will have match rhythm and confidence from earlier wins

counter_strategy.how_to_bowl: Treat this like the Sinclair Lions game — full bowling attack. Use the experience gained from Pway Cubs and Giant Slayers matches. NJ Marvels are strong but their NRR gap (+1.76 vs WW's +0.68) suggests WW need a perfect performance.
counter_strategy.matchup_recommendations: By Aug 30, WW's playoff qualification should already be secured. Use this game to test batting combinations and bowl Tyagi in an extended spell to build his confidence.
